texture_requirements: Parchment grain for light review surfaces.
Dark panel texture for shell surfaces.
Aged brass border treatment for edges and badges.
Subtle map-paper grain for the stitched workspace.
Transparent preview wash for art-layer review.
asset_requirements: Base map layers must stay separate from road/rail, footprint, art, labels, markers, and provenance.
Road / rail geometry must stay separate from the historical base scan.
Building footprints must remain separate from building art.
Building art must only attach to a reviewed building or reviewed location record.
Labels must store text and provenance separately from geometry.
Quest markers must remain runtime overlays and not become historical evidence.
Evidence / provenance must stay visible to reviewers.

layers.label: Base Map Layer
layers.notes: Stitched scan placeholder and sheet identity anchor. Do not collapse other layers into it.

layers.label: Road / Rail Layer
layers.notes: Roads and rail remain separate from the base scan until extraction is implemented.

layers.label: Building Footprint Layer
layers.notes: Footprints hold shape only, not decorative art.

layers.label: Building Art Layer
layers.notes: Transparent-background art should only attach to reviewed anchors and must not become the authoritative source of identity.

layers.label: Label Layer
layers.notes: Street labels, business labels, and building numbers remain separate from geometry.

layers.label: Quest Marker Layer
layers.notes: Mission markers are runtime overlays and must not rewrite the historical record.

layers.label: Evidence / Provenance Layer
layers.notes: Claims, citations, and review status remain visible to reviewers.
